context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements SLAS-based guest authentication using PKCE, handles token lifecycle management proactively, secures tokens via httpOnly cookies, and correctly handles guest-to-customer session continuity with basket merging.

checklist.name: PKCE code verifier generation
checklist.description: Guest token flow generates a code_verifier (random bytes) and derives a code_challenge (SHA-256 hash, base64url encoded) — does NOT skip the PKCE step

checklist.name: Two-step authorize flow
checklist.description: Authorization is done in two steps: (1) GET/POST to the oauth2/authorize endpoint with redirect:manual to capture the auth code from the Location header, (2) POST to oauth2/token with grant_type=authorization_code_pkce

checklist.name: SLAS base URL pattern
checklist.description: SLAS URL is constructed as `https://{SFCC_SHORT_CODE}.api.commercecloud.salesforce.com/shopper/auth/v1` using an environment variable for the short code

checklist.name: ORG_ID environment variable
checklist.description: ORG_ID is read from an environment variable (e.g. SFCC_ORG_ID) and is described or referenced in f_ecom_xxx format

checklist.name: Proactive token refresh
checklist.description: Token refresh is triggered proactively before expiry (e.g. on a timer, checking expiry time) rather than only in response to a 401 error

checklist.name: Refresh token grant type
checklist.description: Token refresh uses grant_type=refresh_token with the refresh_token value and client_id against the oauth2/token endpoint

checklist.name: httpOnly cookie storage
checklist.description: Access tokens are stored in httpOnly cookies set server-side — client-side JavaScript does NOT have direct access to the token value

checklist.name: Server-side proxy for API calls
checklist.description: SFCC API calls from the frontend are routed through a server-side proxy or BFF layer rather than made directly from client-side code

checklist.name: Guest basket merge mechanism
checklist.description: Login flow passes guestBasketId in the POST /baskets request body (with the customer access token) to trigger basket merge — does NOT attempt to merge baskets from different SLAS client IDs

checklist.name: Customer login endpoint
checklist.description: Customer login uses the oauth2/login endpoint with the guest access token in the Authorization header and type=credentials in the body

checklist.name: SLAS channel_id parameter
checklist.description: The authorize request includes channel_id set to the site ID (SFCC_SITE_ID environment variable)
